description: Configure the NextGen Connect Data Pruner extension and channel retention policies to comply with a new data governance mandate. Set the Data Pruner extension to run daily at 03:00 with a block size of 1000, archiving pruned messages, including attachments, and pruning events older than 31 days. For the Regional_ADT_Feed channel, configure retention to prune metadata after 7 days and content after 3 days with archiving enabled. For the Lab_Orders_Interface channel, configure retention to prune metadata after 90 days and content after 30 days with archiving enabled. Access the system via the REST API (https://localhost:8443/api) using credentials admin/admin and the X-Requested-With: OpenAPI header.
